name: MoneyGram
description_short: Omaha's MoneyGram at 3702 S 24th St provides check cashing and money transfers with extended weekday hours in NE.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 3702 S 24th St is a standalone check-cashing location in south Omaha, NE. The storefront is open Mon–Fri 8AM–8:30PM and Sat–Sun 9AM–7PM, making it accessible for quick financial services during extended hours.

This Omaha location specializes in money transfer services and check cashing. Contact the store directly at +1 402-932-8047 to confirm current services or ask about specific transaction fees.

For Omaha residents needing urgent check cashing or remittance services, this S 24th St location offers a reliable alternative to traditional banking. Bring a valid government-issued ID for check cashing transactions.
pros: 19+ locations across Omaha providing convenient access to money transfer services
Partnership with major retailers like Walmart (7 locations) and CVS ensures broad geographic coverage
Extended operating hours until 8:00-9:00 PM at most locations accommodates working schedules
Dual-channel access allowing customers to manage transfers online or in-person
Mix of national chains and local independent businesses (Order Express, Maya Market) serving diverse neighborhoods
Simple location search by address, city, state, or ZIP code on the website
Both domestic and international money sending and receiving capabilities
cons: No fee, exchange rate, or transfer speed information disclosed on the location page
Dependent on retail partner hours and policies; not a dedicated standalone service location
No details provided on transfer limits, identity verification requirements, or security measures
Website lacks information on how to initiate transfers online versus in-person
No customer support details, dispute resolution process, or service guarantees visible
best_for: Consumers sending money to family members domestically or internationally without a bank account
Workers or immigrants needing convenient retail-based money transfer during extended hours
Individuals preferring in-person cash-based transfers over digital banking platforms
Customers already shopping at Walmart or CVS who want to combine errands with money transfer
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers and immigrants needing accessible money transfer services through convenient retail locations with extended hours. The primary caveat is that critical details—fees, exchange rates, transfer speed, and limits—are completely absent from their public-facing location page, requiring customers to contact locations directly or visit the main website for pricing and terms before committing to a transfer.
services: Domestic money transfers (sending funds within the United States)
Money receiving (accepting transfers from other MoneyGram customers)
In-person transfer processing at retail partner locations
Services at Order Express convenience stores
Services at local independent retailers (Maya Market)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 3702 S 24th St, Omaha, NE. Check cashing and money transfers with extended weekday hours.
